phrases.cultural_note: Last entry is typically 30 to 60 minutes before the official closing time. Providing a specific hour is the most direct and helpful answer.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if Zátkův dům has lift access
phrases.cultural_note: Historic buildings like Zátkův dům often have a modern lift installed, but it might be small or tucked away from the main staircase.

likely_response.local: Ano, výtah je na konci chodby.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, the lift is at the end of the corridor.

responses.english: Yes, the lift is at the end of the corridor.
responses.french: Ano, výtah je na konci chodby.

phrases.cultural_note: Numismatic collections are typically displayed in secure glass cases, often in a dedicated, quieter section of a museum.

likely_response.local: V prvním patře, vlevo od schodiště.
likely_response.translation_en: On the first floor, to the left of the stairs.

responses.english: On the first floor, to the left of the stairs.
responses.french: V prvním patře, vlevo od schodiště.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if special exhibit costs extra
phrases.cultural_note: Czech museums often charge a separate fee for temporary exhibitions, paid in addition to the permanent collection ticket.

likely_response.local: Ano, k základnímu vstupnému je příplatek.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is a surcharge on top of the basic admission.

responses.english: Yes, there is a surcharge on top of the basic admission.
responses.french: Ano, k základnímu vstupnému je příplatek.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if audio guide has English
phrases.cultural_note: Major museums in Czech regional capitals almost always offer audio guides in English and German as a minimum standard.
